title: AI startup tooling is getting more opinionated
author: Example Author
content_text: AI startup tooling is shifting toward agent workflows. OpenAI and Anthropic are mentioned alongside developer tooling. Teams still disagree on deployment readiness, which creates product gaps.

title: Agent workflow demand is becoming more concrete
author: Example Author
content_text: Developers want better observability and deployment controls for agent workflows. OpenAI is mentioned again, and teams still see whitespace in startup tooling.
